title: Gore Gore Gogore lyrics Moscowin Kaveri Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song :Gore Gore 
Movie:  Moscowin Kaveri
Singer(s): Karthik, Suchitra
Lyrics : Vairamuthu

Gore Gore Gogore Gore
Gore Gogore Gogore

Poottupota poove un kannil mazhayai vaithaai
April madha veyilai un sollil en vaithaai
Poottupota poove un kannil mazhayai vaithaai
April madha veyilai un sollil en vaithaai

Ulley thanneer veliye vetpam
rendum sernthadhu penniname
Ne theeyai irundhal thenneraven
thalliyirupathu ganniyame
Madhana madhana naan manjam vandha thangathere

Gore Gogore Gogore
Gore Gogore Gogore
Gore Gore Gogore Gore
Gore Gogore ..Gogore

Mudhal mutham koduthadhu evvidam
Mudhal mottu udaindhadhu evvidam
Sariyaga sollivittal anbu
Illai thappupaai sollivitaal vambu .. (2)

Idhu vinmele paaindhayutham
idari vizhundhadhu kannathil
Rendo moonro thozhviyadaindhu
mottu undaindhadhu vegathil
Radhiye radhiye nan solliya unmaigal nootruku nooru

Gore Gogore Gogore
Gore Gogore Gogore
Gore Gore Gogore Gore
Gore Gogore ..Gogore

Mudhal murai paarthadhu endha naal
unnil mudhal viral padhithathu evvidam
Sariyaga sollivittal anbu
Illai thappupaai sollivitaal vambu .. (2)

Assai paarivai paarthukondadhu
octobar madham 7zham naal
Mudhal viral padhithathu evvidam
enbadu aadaigal ariyum naanariyen
Madhana madhana nan solliya unmaigal nootruku nooru

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the beauty of love and the joy it brings, using vivid imagery and romantic metaphors.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Moscowin Kaveri, the song plays during a romantic sequence, highlighting the blossoming relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Karthik and Suchitra, with music composed by Thaman S.

When was the song released?

Gore Gore Gogore was released on July 18, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Gore Gore Gogore, the vibrant duet sung by Karthik and Suchitra encapsulates the essence of romance and joy. The song is set against a backdrop of blossoming love in Moscowin Kaveri, where the lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of affection and admiration. With its catchy melody and heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu, the song evokes feelings of happiness and nostalgia. It's a perfect choice for weddings and celebrations, making it a timeless romantic anthem.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Gore Gore Gogore from Moscowin Kaveri is a delightful romantic duet that captures the essence of love and joy. With the enchanting voices of Karthik and Suchitra, this song brings a vibrant energy that resonates with listeners. The lyrical brilliance of Vairamuthu combined with Thaman S's melodious composition makes this track a must-listen for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: You, the flower that blooms, have brought rain to my eyes. In the April sun, you have placed my words.
Inside, the water and outside, the fire have come together, oh woman. If the fire is there, the sweetness will be pushed away. Oh dear, I have come to you like a golden treasure.
Gore Gogore Gogore Gore Gogore Gogore Gore Gore Gogore Gore Gore Gogore ..Gogore
The first kiss was given here. The first word was spoken here. If love is told correctly, it is not wrong; if it is said wrongly, it is a lie.
This is a song that has fallen from the sky, it has fallen into the eyes. In the rush, two or three greetings have formed a kiss.
Gore Gogore Gogore Gore Gogore Gogore Gore Gore Gogore Gore Gore Gogore ..Gogore
The first time I saw you, which day was it? The first finger touched you here. If love is told correctly, it is not wrong; if it is said wrongly, it is a lie.
On the day of October 7, I looked at the desires. The first finger touched you here, and I know the songs.
Gore Gogore Gogore Gore Gogore Gogore Gore Gore Gogore Gore Gore Gogore ..Gogore
